item.title: Browsers
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Browsers, The Holy Portal to the Internet. Nowadays, People mostly use Laptops or PCs just to access the Internet via Web Browsers.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Package Management
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Installing Applications in Windows isn't Secure. We either download executable files from some Websites or from The Microsoft Store where many Applications are Paid or Unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Debloating Windows
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Now, that we have installed Windows 10, We need to Debloat it.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Installing Windows
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction It's an Unfortunate Event but it has happened, I have Installed Windows 10.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Grocery Shop Management System
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Grocery Shop Management System is a Software made to ease the management of a Grocery Shop and assists in keeping logs of Products, Customers, Inventory, and Bills.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: SUPER STEVE
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Super Steve is a Minecraft Parody, which I made after watching the CS50 Lecture.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar
